plan.title: Add a big-jump triage entry point to UPGRADING.md for multi-version upgrades

narratives.Description: UPGRADING.md is organised newest-first by version with no top-of-file triage, so a consumer jumping many minor versions must read every section to infer which apply and in what order. This story adds a big-jump entry point that names version-range buckets and apply-order so a multi-version upgrader can self-route quickly.
narratives.ImplementationPlan:
Add a big-jump triage section to the top of the UPGRADING.md file that maps version-range buckets to the sections that apply and their apply-order, and calls out which steps are auto-handled versus manual.
Add a contract test under tests/content asserting UPGRADING.md exposes the big-jump entry point and that its QUICK-START.md cross-references resolve to existing anchors.
narratives.UserStory: As a deft operator on an old version, I want a big-jump entry point in UPGRADING.md, so that I can determine which upgrade sections apply without reading every one.

items.title: Given an operator on a multi-version jump, when they open UPGRADING.md, then a top-of-file triage section shows which version buckets apply and in what order.

narrative.Acceptance: Given an operator on a multi-version jump, when they open UPGRADING.md, then a top-of-file triage section shows which version buckets apply and in what order.

items.title: When the triage section references QUICK-START.md and the doctor command surface, then those cross-references resolve to existing anchors.

narrative.Acceptance: When the triage section references QUICK-START.md and the doctor command surface, then those cross-references resolve to existing anchors.

items.title: A contract test validates that UPGRADING.md exposes a discoverable big-jump entry point and that its cross-references stay consistent.

narrative.Acceptance: A contract test validates that UPGRADING.md exposes a discoverable big-jump entry point and that its cross-references stay consistent.

expected_outputs: UPGRADING.md exposes a big-jump triage entry point
contract test for the entry point and cross-references

references.title: Issue #1115: docs(UPGRADING): add big-jump triage / entry point for multi-version upgrades
